# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: static-website-bucket
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD
      lifecycle:
        rule:
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              age: 365
      versioning:
        enabled: true
      website:
        mainPageSuffix: index.html
        notFoundPage: 404.html
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true

  - name: bucket-iam-policy
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets.setIamPolicy
    properties:
      bucket: $(ref.static-website-bucket.name)
      iamPolicy:
        bindings:
          - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
            members:
              - allUsers

outputs:
  - name: bucketName
    value: $(ref.static-website-bucket.name)
